calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Injunction And Appoint Receiver; Declaration Of Deputy City Attorney Michael S. Weiss And Building Inspector John Hinchion In Support
Off Calendar Jun-16-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Motion to Enforce Injunction and Appoint Receiver Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Michael Weiss, Deputy City Attorney for Plaintiff City and County of San Francisco.
No appearance by the Defendant Raymond J. Martelli.
After considering the moving papers, the Memorandum of Points and Authorities, and arguments, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant.
Motion is granted and signed in open court, see scanned doc. for details of the Order.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-11-2009 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2009 Continued To May-22-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-02-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Michael Weiss, Esq. appeared for plaintiff City and County of San Francisco, a Municipal Corporation, and People of the State of California, by and through Dennis J. Herrera, City Attorney for the City and County of San Francisco.
John Hinchion, Building Inspector for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Raymond J. Martelli.
Default was entered against defendant on January 14, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, April 2, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff City and County of San Francisco, a Municipal Corporation, and People of the State of California, by and through Dennis J. Herrera, City Attorney for the City and County of San Francisco, and against the Defaulted Defendant Raymond J. Martelli as follows:

Damages/Principal - $1,762,500.00.
Attorney's Fees - $25,750.00.
Costs - $1,433.20, for a total judgment in the amount of $1,789,683.20.

Furthermore, the property commonly known and described as 913 Alvarado Street, San Francisco, CA, and more particularly described in Exhibit A attached to the judgment, is a public nuisance.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-27-2009 Continued To Apr-10-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-03-2008 Continued To Feb-06-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-07-2008 Off Calendar
